title: Classic British-Style Italian Beef Bangers
description: A creative twist on traditional Italian beef, infused with the flavors of classic British bangers.
instructions: 2. Season the beef fillet with salt and pepper. Sear in a hot pan with olive oil until browned on all sides.
3. Transfer the beef to a baking dish and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
4. While the beef is cooking, cook the Italian bangers in a pan over medium heat until browned and crispy.
5. Serve the beef with the cooked bangers, tomato sauce, and a side of mash.
6. Slice the beef into thin strips and serve with a side of chewy bread for a satisfying meal.
